translation_text: He who stands on his tiptoes does not stand firm;
translation_text_raw: He who stands on his tiptoes does not stand firm;

translation_text: he who stretches his legs does not walk (easily).
translation_text_raw: he who stretches his legs does not walk (easily).

translation_text: (So), he who displays himself does not shine;
translation_text_raw: (So), he who displays himself does not shine;

translation_text: he who asserts his own views is not distinguished;
translation_text_raw: he who asserts his own views is not distinguished;

translation_text: he who vaunts himself does not find his merit acknowledged;
translation_text_raw: he who vaunts himself does not find his merit acknowledged;

translation_text: he who is self- conceited has no superiority allowed to him.
translation_text_raw: he who is self- conceited has no superiority allowed to him.

chinese_text: 其在道也，曰餘食贅行。物或惡之，
translation_text: Such conditions, viewed from the standpoint of the Dao, are like remnants of food, or a tumour on the body, which all dislike.
translation_text_raw: Such conditions, viewed from the standpoint of the Dao, are like remnants of food, or a tumour on the body, which all dislike.

translation_text: Hence those who pursue (the course) of the Dao do not adopt and allow them.
translation_text_raw: Hence those who pursue (the course) of the Dao do not adopt and allow them.
